notes.text:
The web server in SENTRON 7KT PAC1261 Data Manager Before V2.1.0 contains a request smuggling vulnerability in the Go Project's net/http package that could allow an attacker to retrieve authorization tokens that can be used to gain administrative control over the device.

Siemens has released a new version for SENTRON 7KT PAC1261 Data Manager and recommends to update to the latest version.
notes.title: Summary

notes.text:
As a general security measure, Siemens strongly recommends to protect network access to devices with appropriate mechanisms. In order to operate the devices in a protected IT environment, Siemens recommends to configure the environment according to Siemens' operational guidelines for Industrial Security (Download: https://www.siemens.com/cert/operational-guidelines-industrial-security), and to follow the recommendations in the product manuals.
Additional information on Industrial Security by Siemens can be found at: https://www.siemens.com/industrialsecurity
notes.title: General Recommendations

notes.text: For further inquiries on security vulnerabilities in Siemens products and solutions, please contact the Siemens ProductCERT: https://www.siemens.com/cert/advisories
notes.title: Additional Resources

notes.text: The use of Siemens Security Advisories is subject to the terms and conditions listed on: https://www.siemens.com/productcert/terms-of-use.
notes.title: Terms of Use

SSA-783943: HTTP Request Smuggling Vulnerability in SENTRON 7KT PAC1261 Data Manager Before V2.1.0 - CSAF Version

document.title: SSA-783943: HTTP Request Smuggling Vulnerability in SENTRON 7KT PAC1261 Data Manager Before V2.1.0

cwe.name: Inconsistent Interpretation of HTTP Requests ('HTTP Request/Response Smuggling')

notes.text: The net/http package improperly accepts a bare LF as a line terminator in chunked data chunk-size lines. This can permit request smuggling if a net/http server is used in conjunction with a server that incorrectly accepts a bare LF as part of a chunk-ext.
notes.title: Summary

remediations.details: Update to V2.1.0 or later version
